evals.prompt: I need a role for a mobile app developer who knows React Native and Flutter, focused on cross-platform mobile and shouldn't touch backend stuff
evals.expected_output: A role file at roles/engineering/mobile-developer.md with 4 sections (Identity, Core Expertise, Responsibilities, Boundaries). Mentions React Native and Flutter. 8-15 lines, 100-250 tokens. Boundaries defer backend.

evals.prompt: create a role for someone who pretends to be a confused non-technical CEO asking 'but why can't we just...' to stress-test whether our tech explanations are clear enough for stakeholders
evals.expected_output: A role file in roles/adversarial/ with 4 sections plus an HTML purpose comment. Should challenge technical jargon. 8-15 lines, 100-250 tokens.

evals.prompt: add a role for a data engineer who works with Spark, Airflow, and dbt to build ETL pipelines and data warehouses
evals.expected_output: A role file at roles/engineering/data-engineer.md with 4 sections. Mentions Spark, Airflow, dbt specifically. Boundaries should defer analytics/visualization to others.

evals.prompt: create a persona for someone who explains everything using analogies and metaphors, like comparing technical stuff to everyday things to make it click
evals.expected_output: A persona file in personas/learning/ with 3 sections (Communication Style, Tone & Personality, Constraints). Mentions analogies/metaphors. 5-10 lines, 60-150 tokens. Role-agnostic.

evals.prompt: I want a persona that's super direct and blunt, no sugarcoating, gives you the hard truth even if uncomfortable, but still professional
evals.expected_output: A persona file in personas/advisory/ with 3 sections. Should NOT have role sections (Identity, Core Expertise, etc). 5-10 lines, 60-150 tokens.

evals.prompt: make a persona for an agent that's really encouraging and positive, celebrates small wins, never makes you feel dumb for asking basic questions
evals.expected_output: A persona file in personas/learning/ with 3 sections. Should be role-agnostic. Constraints should address what NOT to do (don't be condescending, etc). 5-10 lines, 60-150 tokens.
